item.title: Germany’s foreign minister says French defence spending is ‘insufficient’ in rebuke to Macron – Europe live

item.title: Starmer says government will tighten rules on teens using social media and remains ‘open-minded’ about ban for under-16s – UK politics live

item.title: Australian women and children released from Syrian detention camp
item.description: The group of 34 – families of dead or jailed extremists – could return to Australia after being held since 2019 Get our breaking news email , free app...
